items.text: While the Company continues to diversify its portfolio with the addition of the expansion markets, the Company’s properties are still predominantly concentrated in our established coastal markets.
items.rationale: Restates and expands the existing geographic concentration risk by noting continued predominance in established coastal markets despite diversification efforts.

items.text: Land parcels acquired for development may lose significant value prior to the start of construction.
items.rationale: Introduces a specific new risk regarding land held for development losing value before construction begins, not previously described.

items.text: Real estate investments often cannot be sold quickly due to regulatory constraints, market conditions or otherwise.
items.rationale: Generic, commonly used cautionary statement about illiquidity of real estate investments due to regulatory or market constraints, lacking specific new detail.

items.text: The capitalization rates/disposition yields at which properties may be sold could also be higher than historic rates, thereby reducing our potential proceeds from sale.
items.rationale: Adds specific detail about capitalization rates/disposition yields potentially exceeding historic levels, expanding on existing market/valuation risk.

items.text: To the extent we have commitments to, on behalf of or are dependent on any such off-balance sheet commitments, or if those commitments or their properties or leases are subject to material contingencies, our liquidity and financial condition could be adversely affected.
items.rationale: Identifies a new specific risk tied to off-balance sheet commitments and contingencies affecting liquidity and financial condition.

items.text: Higher interest rates could also result in increased capitalization rates, which may lead to reduced valuations of the Company’s assets.
items.rationale: Elaborates on the existing interest rate risk by linking higher rates to increased capitalization rates and reduced asset valuations.

items.text: If we do not dispose of our properties through tax deferred transactions, we may be required to distribute the gain proceeds to shareholders or pay income tax.
items.rationale: Introduces a specific tax-related risk concerning non-tax-deferred property dispositions requiring distribution of gains or payment of income tax.
